texto: When I was younger I used to think that band-aids did all the work. I mean after all, it binds your wound together and makes everything better back to the way it was. But then I became an adult and started to fall in love,fvi and I realize that band-aids are so overrated lol.
explicacao: Citação de Onee'sha Ford sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “When I was younger I used to think that band-aids did all the work. I mean after all, it binds yo…” articula humor, cute, funny em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e funny.
